parsed_output.justification: Kevin claims to be the Seer and confirms that Jessica is the Minion. Jessica, claiming to be the Minion, states that she does not see any Werewolves among the players and believes the Werewolf card is in the center. Since the Minion knows the identity of the Werewolves, her statement implies that no player is currently a Werewolf. According to the rules, Team Village wins if no player is a Werewolf and no one is voted out.
